disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Suspected Ebola patient visited African outbreak zone ; Test results expected today
updates.summary_zh: 疑似埃博拉患者曾访非洲疫区，今日出检测结果。

updates.title_en: Decimated CDC could struggle in face of Ebola outbreak
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC被削弱，可能难以应对埃博拉疫情。

updates.title_en: Researchers highlight hidden spread of Hantavirus in Pacific Northwest rodents
updates.summary_zh: 研究人员强调汉坦病毒在太平洋西北部啮齿动物中隐匿传播。

updates.title_en: No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says - CBC
updates.body_en: No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says CBC Canada’s chief public health officer delivers updates on hantavirus, Ebola Radio-Canada Ontario patient tests negative for Ebola, while new border screening measures are in place amid Congo outbreak CTV News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大首席卫生官称无新增汉坦病例。

updates.title_en: All U . S . passengers returning from Ebola - affected countries must arrive at one airport
updates.summary_zh: 美国要求所有来自埃博拉疫区旅客集中入境。
